top_signals.title: Federal judge denies Kalshi’s bid to block New York gambling law enforcement
top_signals.summary: The judge said New York gambling laws, as applied to Kalshi's sports-event contracts, are not preempted by the federal Commodity Exchange Act.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Webinar tomorrow: Why modern email attacks require a new approach to defense
top_signals.summary: Tomorrow's webinar explores how behavioral AI can help organizations detect sophisticated phishing, business email compromise, and account takeover attacks while reducing alert fatigue through automated investigation and response workflows. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
